moves.name: Standing Heavy Punch
moves.nameJa: 立ち強P（ごっつぁんチョップ）

moves.notesEn: Produces a crumple stun on Punish Counter if the opponent is standing on the groundForces a juggle state on Punish Counter when hitting a mid-air opponentCan be canceled up until the 3rd active frame*Can be canceled by Hundred Hand Slap from frames 8 - 14 if Sumo Spirit is active

moves.name: Standing Heavy Kick
moves.notes: 強制立ち効果空中ヒット時吹き飛びダウン
moves.notesEn: Forces the opponent into a standing positionForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

moves.nameJa: しゃがみ中P（しゃがみ突っ張り）

moves.nameJa: ジャンプ弱P（ジャンプ突き手）

moves.nameJa: ジャンプ弱K（百貫落とし）

moves.nameJa: ジャンプ中K（わらじ蹴り）

moves.nameJa: ジャンプ強K（跳び丸太蹴り）

moves.name: Neutral Jumping Heavy Punch
moves.nameJa: 垂直ジャンプ強P（大熊手）

moves.name: Harai Kick
moves.notes: パニッシュカウンター時吹き飛びダウン
moves.notesEn: Forces a juggle state on Punish Counter

moves.name: Power Stomp
moves.notes: 空中ヒット時床バウンド、ハードノックダウン※15F目で必殺技、SAで空振りキャンセル可能
moves.notesEn: Produces a ground bound and hard knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent* Can cancel into a special move or Super Art on frame 15 when the attack misses

moves.name: Flying Sumo Press
moves.nameJa: フライングスモウプレス
moves.notes: めくり性能
moves.notesEn: Has cross-up attack properties

moves.name: Toko Shizume
moves.notes: 空中ヒット時床バウンド、ハードノックダウン※14F目で必殺技、SAで空振りキャンセル可能※ヒット時、肩屋入りでのみキャンセル可能クラシック操作:↓+強K、モダン操作:↓＋中
moves.notesEn: Produces a ground bound and hard knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent* Can cancel into a special move or Super Art on frame 14 when the attack misses* Can only be canceled into Sumo Spirit on hitClassic controls: ↓+Punch, Modern controls: ↓+Attack

moves.name: L Hundred Hand Slap
moves.notes: 最終段のみキャンセル可能空中ヒット時吹き飛びダウン
moves.notesEn: Only the last hit can be canceledForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

moves.name: [Sumo Spirit]L Hundred Hand Slap
moves.nameJa: [肩屋入り]弱 百裂張り手
moves.notes: 最終段のみキャンセル可能2段目ヒット時のみ最終段に派生空中ヒット時吹き飛びダウン
moves.notesEn: Only the last hit can be canceledOnly transitions into the final hit if the 2nd hit connectsForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

moves.name: M Hundred Hand Slap
moves.notes: 最終段のみキャンセル可能空中ヒット時吹き飛びダウン

moves.notesEn: Only the last hit can be canceledOnly transitions into the final hit if the 5th hit connectsForces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

moves.name: L Sumo Headbutt
moves.nameJa: 弱 スーパー頭突き
moves.notes: キャンセルは持続の4F目まで4-13F　空中判定の打撃・空弾属性に対して無敵14-33F　空中判定持続5F目以降は個別ダメージ(1000)
moves.notesEn: Can be canceled until the 4th active frameInvincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 4 - 13Considered airborne from frames 14 - 33Does 1000 damage after the 5th active frame

moves.name: M Sumo Headbutt
moves.nameJa: 中 スーパー頭突き
moves.notes: キャンセルは持続の4F目まで5-13F　空中判定の打撃・空弾属性に対して無敵14-35F　空中判定持続5F目以降は個別ダメージ（1100）
moves.notesEn: Can be canceled until the 4th active frameInvincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 5 - 13Considered airborne from frames 14 - 35Does 1100 damage after the 5th active frame

moves.name: H Sumo Headbutt
moves.nameJa: 強 スーパー頭突き
moves.notes: キャンセルは持続の4F目まで6-16F　空中判定の打撃・空弾属性に対して無敵18-40F　空中判定持続5F目以降は個別ダメージ（1300）19F目以降で相手との位置が入れ替わった際に終了準備アクションへ移行
moves.notesEn: Can be canceled until the 4th active frameInvincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 6 - 16Considered airborne from frames 18 - 40Does 1300 damage after the 5th active frameIf Honda and the opponent switch sides after the 19th frame, transitions into ending animation action

moves.name: OD Sumo Headbutt
moves.notes: 1-持続終了　 アーマー判定（2回）26F目以降で相手との位置関係が入れ替わった場合、画面端に到達した場合、終了アクションへ移行14-　空中判定動作中常に被パニッシュカウンター判定
moves.notesEn: Super Armor for 2 hits from the 1st frame until the end of the active framesIf Honda and the opponent switch sides after the 27th frame, transitions into ending animation actionConsidered airborne from frame 14Always in Punish Counter state during execution.

moves.name: L Sumo Smash
moves.nameJa: 弱 スーパー百貫落とし
moves.notes: めくり性能7-48F　空中判定下降部分のみパニッシュカウンターで、床バウンド下降のめくり部分は個別ダメージ（800）下降部分ヒット時、ハードノックダウン
moves.notesEn: Has cross-up attack propertiesConsidered airborne from frames 7 - 48Produces a floor bounce only when the falling attack hits as a Punish CounterIf the falling attack hits as a cross-up, damage is 800Produces a hard knockdown when the falling attack part hits

moves.name: M Sumo Smash
moves.nameJa: 中 スーパー百貫落とし
moves.notes: めくり性能7-45F　空中判定下降部分のみパニッシュカウンターで、床バウンド下降のめくり部分は個別ダメージ（800）下降部分ヒット時、ハードノックダウン
moves.notesEn: Has cross-up attack propertiesConsidered airborne from frames 7 - 45Produces a floor bounce only when the falling attack hits as a Punish CounterIf the falling attack hits as a cross-up, damage is 800Produces a hard knockdown when the falling attack part hits

moves.name: H Sumo Smash
moves.nameJa: 強 スーパー百貫落とし
moves.notes: めくり性能7-42F　空中判定下降部分のみパニッシュカウンターで、床バウンド下降のめくり部分は個別ダメージ（800）下降部分ヒット時、ハードノックダウン
moves.notesEn: Has cross-up attack propertiesConsidered airborne from frames 7 - 42Produces a floor bounce only when the falling attack hits as a Punish CounterIf the falling attack hits as a cross-up, damage is 800Produces a hard knockdown when the falling attack part hits

moves.name: OD Sumo Smash
moves.nameJa: OD スーパー百貫落とし
moves.notes: めくり性能5-17F　空中判定の打撃・空弾属性に対して無敵5-13F　投げに対して無敵5-39F　空中判定下降部分のみパニッシュカウンターで、床バウンド下降のめくり部分は個別ダメージ（800）下降部分ヒット時、ハードノックダウン
moves.notesEn: Has cross-up attack propertiesInvincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 5 - 17Invincible to throws from frames 5 - 13Considered airborne from frames 5 - 39Produces a floor bounce only when the falling attack hits as a Punish CounterIf the falling attack hits as a cross-up, damage is 800Produces a hard knockdown when the falling attack part hits

moves.name: L Oicho Throw
moves.notes: パニッシュカウンター時ダメージ（2300）
moves.notesEn: Damage set to 2300 on Punish Counter

moves.notesEn: Damage set to 2645 on Punish Counter

moves.name: H Oicho Throw
moves.notes: ■クラシック操作パニッシュカウンター時ダメージ（2760）■モダン操作時パニッシュカウンター時個別ダメージ（2208）
moves.notesEn: With Classic ControlsDoes 2760 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish CounterWith Modern ControlsDoes 2208 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

moves.name: OD Oicho Throw
moves.notes: ■クラシック操作パニッシュカウンター時ダメージ（3220）■モダン操作時パニッシュカウンター時個別ダメージ（2576）
moves.notesEn: With Classic ControlsDoes 3220 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish CounterWith Modern ControlsDoes 2576 individual damage when the attack lands as a Punish Counter

moves.name: Sumo Dash
moves.notes: 14-43F　鉄砲、大砲へ派生可能
moves.notesEn: Can transition to Taiho Cannon Lift or Teppo Triple Slap from frames 14 - 43

moves.name: OD Sumo Dash
moves.notes: 13-27F　OD 鉄砲へ派生可能11-27F　OD 大砲へ派生可能
moves.notesEn: Can transition to Teppo Triple Slap from frames 13 - 27Can transition to Taiho Cannon Lift from frames 11 - 27

moves.name: Teppo Triple Slap(1)
moves.notes: ヒット/ガード時に34F目で最終段へ派生可能
moves.notesEn: Can transition to the final attack on the 34th frame on either hit or block.

moves.name: OD Teppo Triple Slap(1)
moves.notes: ヒット/ガード時に33F目で最終段へ派生可能
moves.notesEn: Can transition to the final attack on the 33th frame on either hit or block.

moves.name: Taiho Cannon Lift
moves.notes: ヒット時は硬直15F、全体49F
moves.notesEn: On hit, recovery is 15 frames and the total attack is 49 frames

moves.name: OD Taiho Cannon Lift
moves.notes: ヒット時は硬直15F、全体49F
moves.notesEn: On hit, recovery is 15 frames and the total attack is 49 frames

moves.name: Neko Damashi
moves.notes: 飛び道具相殺判定あり（1回）※肩屋入り中、百裂張り手でキャンセル可能
moves.notesEn: Clashes with projectiles (Once)* Can be canceled into Hundred Hand Slap if Sumo Spirit is active

moves.name: Sumo Spirit
moves.notes: 51F目で肩屋入りをストック次回発動する百裂張り手の性質変化
moves.notesEn: Stocks Sumo Spirit on frame 51Changes the properties of the next Hundred Hand Slap performed

moves.name: SA1 Show of Force
moves.notes: 1-11F　打撃・投げに対して無敵最低保障ダメージ30％カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない
moves.notesEn: Invincible to strikes and projectiles from frames 1 - 11Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 30%Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

moves.name: SA2 Ultimate Killer Head Ram
moves.notes: 1-18F　完全無敵19-36F　飛び道具に対して無敵頭突き部分2段目ヒット時に張り手に派生張り手部分の最終段ヒット時にさらに派生最低保障ダメージ40％カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない24F目以降で相手との位置が入れ替わった場合終了アクションへ
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 18Invincible to projectiles from frames 19 - 36Transitions to hand slaps if the second hit of the headbutt connectsTransitions again during the last hit of the hand slapsMinimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%Values do not change on counter or Punish CounterIf Honda and the opponent switch sides after the 24th frame, transitions into ending animation action

moves.name: SA3 The Final Bout
moves.notes: 1-11F　完全無敵最低保障ダメージ50％カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない※必殺技キャンセル時のみ適用
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 11Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%* Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

moves.name: CA The Final Bout
moves.notes: 1-11F　完全無敵最低保障ダメージ50％カウンター/パニッシュカウンターで数値が変動しない※必殺技キャンセル時のみ適用
moves.notesEn: Completely invincible from frames 1 - 11Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 50%* Values do not change on counter or Punish Counter

moves.name: Saba Ori
moves.notes: パニッシュカウンター時以下の性能変化・ダメージ2040・SAゲージ4000増加・ハードノックダウン
moves.notesEn: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

moves.name: Tawara Throw
moves.notes: パニッシュカウンター時以下の性能変化・ダメージ2040・SAゲージ4000増加・ハードノックダウン
moves.notesEn: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

moves.name: Backward Dash
moves.notes: 1-15F 投げ無敵
moves.notesEn: Invincible to throws from frame 1 to frame 15.

moves.name: Drive Impact: Sumo Crunch
moves.nameJa: ドライブインパクト（ぶちかまし）
moves.notes: 1-27F　 アーマー判定（2回）パニッシュカウンター、もしくはアーマー成立後にヒットで以下の性能変化・地上ヒット膝崩れ・空中ヒット吹き飛びダウン・SAゲージ3000増加
moves.notesEn: Super Armor for 2 attacks from frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallOn Punish Counter or after a successful hit after Super Armor absorbs a hit, the following properties change:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Juggle state time is increased if the opponent is in the air- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

moves.name: Drive Reversal (while blocking): Raiden-Ho
moves.nameJa: [ガード時]ドライブリバーサル（雷電砲）
moves.notes: リカバリアブルダメージ1-22F 完全無敵ヒット時硬直5F増加
moves.notesEn: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

moves.name: Drive Reversal (while recovering): Raiden-Ho
moves.nameJa: [起き上がり時]ドライブリバーサル（雷電砲）
moves.notes: リカバリアブルダメージ1-20F 完全無敵ヒット時硬直5F増加
moves.notesEn: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible on frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

moves.name: Drive Parry
moves.notes: ※1 動作の4F目からドライブラッシュでキャンセル可※2 ボタンホールドでパリィの持続を延長可硬直部分はガードのみ可動作中常に被パニッシュカウンター判定
moves.notesEn: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution.

moves.name: Perfect Parry (strike)
moves.notes: 相手の攻撃に対応した方向入力を行った状態でパリィを入力し、入力したフレーム、もしくはその次のフレームで攻撃を受けると成立する（上段/中段攻撃に対して←方向、下段攻撃に対しては↙方向)方向が正しくなかった場合は通常のドライブパリィとなり、追加でDゲージが3000増加する硬直終了から5Fの間完全無敵 （パリィを継続した場合は無敵にならない）ジャストパリィを取られた側はキャンセルが出来なくなり、動作終了まで強制パニッシュカウンター
moves.notesEn: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

moves.name: Perfect Parry (projectile)
moves.nameJa: ジャストパリィ（飛び道具）
moves.notes: パリィを入力したフレーム、もしくはその次のフレームで攻撃を受けると成立する暗転演出が入らないジャストパリィを取られた側はキャンセルが出来なくなり、動作終了まで強制パニッシュカウンター
moves.notesEn: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occurs.The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

moves.name: Parry Drive Rush
moves.nameJa: パリィドライブラッシュ
moves.notes: 暗転10F※動作9F目から攻撃行動にキャンセル可　24F目からパリィ以外の行動でキャンセル可
moves.notesEn: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

moves.name: Cancel Drive Rush
moves.nameJa: キャンセルドライブラッシュ
moves.notes: 暗転9F※動作10F目から攻撃行動にキャンセル可　25F目からパリィ以外の行動でキャンセル可
moves.notesEn: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
